description_long: This serving tray features a triangular wooden base with a light, natural wood grain finish. On the tray, there are several small, conical objects resembling stylized mountains, each with a marbled black, white, and beige pattern, arranged in a cluster. A single ceramic cup or bowl, filled with a reddish liquid, is positioned near one corner of the tray, contrasting with the angular geometry of the base. The tray is divided into two levels, with the higher section holding the cup and the lower section supporting the mountain-like forms. The edges of the tray are straight and clean, with no visible handles or cutouts. The overall design is modern and abstract, with a focus on geometric forms and contrasting textures.
description: A triangular wooden serving tray with marbled conical decorations and a ceramic cup containing a reddish liquid. The tray has two levels and a modern, abstract design.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the ceramic cup prominently on the upper level and a clear arrangement of the marbled conical forms on the lower section.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the length of the tray, the cup's placement at the far end, and the alignment of the conical forms.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the marbled conical forms, with the cup partially obscured and the tray's stepped design visible.
description_view_3: Right-rear view showing the cup on the upper level and a close-up of the conical forms, with the tray's triangular shape evident.
attribute_rim_design: The tray has a low, straight rim along its edges, approximately 1-2 cm high, with a flat and unadorned profile. There are no lips, grooves, or decorative elements on the rim.
attribute_decorative_patterns: The conical forms on the tray feature abstract marbled patterns in black, white, and beige, covering their entire surfaces. The tray and cup are otherwise plain.
attribute_reflective_properties: The wooden tray and marbled cones have a matte finish with minimal reflectivity, while the ceramic cup has a slightly higher, semi-matte sheen. No strong reflections or highlights are visible.
